summary: Iteration 31: Bug fix verification for save button, auto-save, and named revision functionality. All fixes verified working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay intercepts click on Save button - requires force=True to click
ui_bugs.workaround: Use force=True in Playwright tests or adjust z-index

passed_tests: Navigate to customer detail page via eye icon - PASS
FloatingSaveButton appears when making changes (isDirty=true) - PASS
Save button in FloatingSaveButton triggers saveToServer() - PASS
Save button creates localStorage revision via addDynamicRevision() - PASS
'Saved' indicator appears after successful save - PASS
Auto-save debounce works (2s delay then auto-saves) - PASS
isDirty clears after auto-save completes - PASS
History tab displays Auto-Saves with correct count - PASS
Auto-save revisions show Rename and Restore buttons - PASS
Rename button promotes auto-save to Named Revisions - PASS
Named Revisions section displays promoted revision - PASS
formatRevisionDate function imported and working - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: saveToServer function correctly implemented in DiscoveryContext.jsx (lines 265-280)
onSave prop correctly passed to FloatingSaveButton in CustomerDetail.jsx (line 585)
handleSave in CustomerDetailContent correctly calls both saveToServer and addDynamicRevision (lines 462-490)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All save functionality fixes verified working: (1) FloatingSaveButton appears with onSave prop and shows 'Unsaved changes' indicator, (2) Save button triggers saveToServer() for immediate backend persistence + creates localStorage revision, (3) Auto-save debounce (2s) works and clears isDirty state, (4) History tab shows Auto-Saves/Named Revisions with Rename/Restore functionality, (5) Minor UI issue: Emergent badge overlay intercepts FloatingSaveButton clicks - use force=True in tests.

auto_save_debounce.behavior: Auto-saves after 2s of inactivity, clears isDirty state

features: Rename promotes auto-save to named revision
Restore loads revision data back to form

backend_persistence.verified: Data persists correctly with lastSaved timestamp

bugs_fixed: handleSave creates both server save and localStorage revision
